text:
Odlična usluga, idem već 15godina u ordinaciju. Radio sam implant pre 4 godine i prezadovoljan sam uradjenim. Smatram da ordinacija zaslužuje ocjenu 10+. Iskrena preporuka!
Great service ! So far, I’ve  been with them for 15 years. I did an implant 4 years ago and I'm more than satisfied with a result. It deserves a 10+ rating. I would recommend this place to everyone!

translations.sr:
Odlična usluga, idem već 15godina u ordinaciju. Radio sam implant pre 4 godine i prezadovoljan sam uradjenim. Smatram da ordinacija zaslužuje ocjenu 10+. Iskrena preporuka!
Great service ! So far, I’ve  been with them for 15 years. I did an implant 4 years ago and I'm more than satisfied with a result. It deserves a 10+ rating. I would recommend this place to everyone!
translations.sr_cyrl:
Одлична услуга, идем већ 15 година у ординацију. Радио сам имплант пре 4 године и презадовољан сам урађеним. Сматрам да ординација заслужује оцену 10+. Искрена препорука!
Great service! So far, I've been with them for 15 years. I did an implant 4 years ago and I'm more than satisfied with a result. It deserves a 10+ rating. I would recommend this place to everyone!
translations.en:
Great service, I have been going to this practice for 15 years. I had an implant done 4 years ago and I'm more than satisfied with the result. I think the practice deserves a 10+ rating. Sincere recommendation!
Great service ! So far, I've been with them for 15 years. I did an implant 4 years ago and I'm more than satisfied with a result. It deserves a 10+ rating. I would recommend this place to everyone!
translations.ru:
Отличный сервис, я хожу в эту клинику уже 15 лет. Делал имплант 4 года назад и более чем доволен сделанным. Считаю, что клиника заслуживает оценку 10+. Искренне рекомендую!
Great service! So far, I've been with them for 15 years. I did an implant 4 years ago and I'm more than satisfied with a result. It deserves a 10+ rating. I would recommend this place to everyone!
translations.de:
Hervorragender Service, ich gehe seit 15 Jahren in diese Praxis. Vor 4 Jahren wurde mir ein Implantat gesetzt, und ich bin mit dem Ergebnis mehr als zufrieden. Ich finde, die Praxis verdient eine 10+-Bewertung. Aufrichtige Empfehlung!
Great service! So far, I've been with them for 15 years. I did an implant 4 years ago and I'm more than satisfied with a result. It deserves a 10+ rating. I would recommend this place to everyone!
translations.tr:
Mükemmel hizmet, 15 yıldır bu muayenehaneye gidiyorum. 4 yıl önce implant yaptırdım ve sonuçtan son derece memnunum. Muayenehanenin 10+ puan hak ettiğini düşünüyorum. İçtenlikle tavsiye ederim!
Great service! So far, I've been with them for 15 years. I did an implant 4 years ago and I'm more than satisfied with a result. It deserves a 10+ rating. I would recommend this place to everyone!
